ItacPersonItem.Notes: He is presented as `Gentilhuomo romano et nobil Sanese, et academico Filomato` in Cittadini`s `Le origini della volgar Toscana favella` (1604). Probably to be identified with F. Sergardi, who signed the 1608 `Vincolo` document for the Umoristi
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
